top_signals.title: German start-up Neura raises $1.4bn in humanoid robot push
top_signals.summary: Crypto group Tether, Amazon and Nvidia invest in fundraising deal that values company at about $7bn
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jefferson, Global Economic Developments and the U.S. Economy
top_signals.summary: Speech At the 2026 Bank of Japan-Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies Conference, Tokyo, Japan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Social media platforms warned over role in fuelling Belfast riots
top_signals.summary: Ofcom tells sites to take action over content that may incite violence as Northern Ireland braces for further unrest
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: La inédita pelea de la UFC que llegará a la Casa Blanca
top_signals.summary: La Casa Blanca se prepara para albergar una pelea de la UFC como parte de las celebraciones por los 250 años de Estados Unidos. El evento, impulsado por Donald Trump, coincidirá además con su cumpleaños número 80. (Source: Bloomberg)
